global_description: A medium to large-sized bird with a sleek, all-black plumage and a robust, slightly curved beak. It has a wedge-shaped tail and strong, broad wings. The feathers have a glossy sheen, often appearing iridescent in sunlight.

part_details.plumage: Entirely black with a glossy, sometimes iridescent sheen.
part_details.beak: Thick, slightly curved, black or dark gray.
part_details.tail: Wedge-shaped, black, with a slight fan when spread.
part_details.wings: Broad, strong, black with a glossy finish.
part_details.eyes: Dark, round, set against the black feathers.

spatial_relations: The beak is positioned centrally on the face below the eyes.
The wings extend laterally from the body.
The tail is positioned at the rear, tapering to a wedge shape.
